verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your grace and mercy brought me through I'm living this moment because of You I want to thank You and praise You too Your grace and mercy brought me through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Thank You for saving a sinner like me To tell the world salvation is free There were times when I just didn't do right But You watched over me all day and night

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your grace and mercy brought me through I'm living this moment because of You I want to thank You and praise You too

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Your grace and mercy brought me through Justice demanded that I should die But grace and mercy said Oh no, oh no, oh no We've already paid the price I once was blind But thank God I can see It was because grace and mercy Came along and rescued me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your grace and mercy brought me through I'm living this moment because of You I want to thank You and praise You too Your grace and mercy, your grace and mercy Your grace and mercy brought me through
